content.json:
# Contoso Meals - Observability Dashboard
End-to-end monitoring for AKS services (order-api, payment-service), Container Apps (menu-api, jira-sm, mcp-atlassian), PostgreSQL, and Cosmos DB.

## Resource Health Overview
Current status of core infrastructure components.

content.query:
let aks_health = AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CONTAINERSERVICE"
| where MetricName == "kube_node_status_condition"
| summarize LastValue = avg(Average) by ResourceId
| extend Resource = "AKS Cluster", Status = iff(LastValue >= 1, "Healthy", "Degraded");
let postgres_health = AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DBFORPOSTGRESQL"
| where MetricName == "is_db_alive"
| summarize LastValue = max(Maximum) by ResourceId
| extend Resource = "PostgreSQL", Status = iff(LastValue >= 1, "Healthy", "Unavailable");
let cosmos_health = AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DOCUMENTDB"
| where MetricName == "ServiceAvailability"
| summarize LastValue = avg(Average) by ResourceId
| extend Resource = "Cosmos DB", Status = iff(LastValue >= 99.9, "Healthy", "Degraded");
let containerapp_health = AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where AppRoleName in ("menu-api", "jira-sm", "mcp-atlassian")
| summarize TotalRequests = count(), FailedRequests = countif(ResultCode startswith "5") by AppRoleName
| extend Resource = strcat("Container App: ", AppRoleName), Status = iff(FailedRequests * 100.0 / TotalRequests < 5, "Healthy", "Degraded")
| project Resource, Status;
aks_health
| project Resource, Status
| union postgres_health | project Resource, Status
| union cosmos_health | project Resource, Status
| union containerapp_health
content.title: Resource Health Status

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| summarize RequestCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: HTTP Request Volume (Total Requests Over Time)

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| extend Outcome = case(
    toint(ResultCode) >= 200 and toint(ResultCode) < 400, "Success (2xx/3xx)",
    toint(ResultCode) >= 400 and toint(ResultCode) < 500, "Client Error (4xx)",
    toint(ResultCode) >= 500, "Server Error (5xx)",
    "Unknown"
  )
| summarize Count = count() by Outcome
content.title: Overall Success / Failure Rate

content.json:
## Application Performance
Detailed HTTP metrics for order-api, payment-service, and menu-api.

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where AppRoleName in ("order-api", "payment-service", "menu-api")
| summarize RPS = count() / 60.0 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: HTTP Requests Per Second by Service

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where AppRoleName in ("order-api", "payment-service", "menu-api")
| summarize
    P50 = percentile(DurationMs, 50),
    P95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    P99 = percentile(DurationMs, 99)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| project TimeGenerated,
    strcat(AppRoleName, " P50") , P50,
    strcat(AppRoleName, " P95") , P95,
    strcat(AppRoleName, " P99") , P99
| evaluate pivot(Column1, take_any(P50, P95, P99))
content.title: Response Time Percentiles by Service (ms)

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where AppRoleName in ("order-api", "payment-service", "menu-api")
| extend P50 = DurationMs
| summarize
    P50 = percentile(DurationMs, 50),
    P95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    P99 = percentile(DurationMs, 99)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Response Time P50 / P95 / P99 by Service (ms)

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where AppRoleName in ("order-api", "payment-service", "menu-api")
| extend StatusBucket = case(
    toint(ResultCode) >= 200 and toint(ResultCode) < 300, "2xx",
    toint(ResultCode) >= 400 and toint(ResultCode) < 500, "4xx",
    toint(ResultCode) >= 500, "5xx",
    "Other"
  )
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), StatusBucket
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: HTTP Status Code Distribution Over Time

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where toint(ResultCode) >= 400
| where AppRoleName in ("order-api", "payment-service", "menu-api")
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Service = AppRoleName,
    Operation = Name,
    StatusCode = ResultCode,
    DurationMs = round(DurationMs, 1),
    Url = Url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Failed Request Details (4xx and 5xx)

content.json:
## Infrastructure
AKS cluster metrics, database health, and resource utilization.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where Namespace == "container.azm.ms/cpuUtilization" or Name == "cpuUsageNanoCores"
| extend PodName = tostring(parse_json(Tags)["pod"])
| where isnotempty(PodName)
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), PodName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: AKS CPU Usage by Pod

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where Namespace == "container.azm.ms/memoryUtilization" or Name == "memoryWorkingSetBytes"
| extend PodName = tostring(parse_json(Tags)["pod"])
| where isnotempty(PodName)
| summarize AvgMemoryMB = avg(Val) / 1048576 by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), PodName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: AKS Memory Usage by Pod (MB)

content.query:
let podRestarts = KubePodInventory
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ClusterName contains "contoso-meals"
| distinct TimeGenerated, Name, ContainerRestartCount
| summarize MaxRestarts = max(ContainerRestartCount) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Name
| order by TimeGenerated asc;
podRestarts
| project TimeGenerated, PodName = Name, RestartCount = MaxRestarts
content.title: Pod Restart Count Over Time

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DBFORPOSTGRESQL"
| where MetricName in ("active_connections", "connections_failed")
| summarize Value = avg(Average) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), MetricName
| extend Series = case(
    MetricName == "active_connections", "Active Connections",
    MetricName == "connections_failed", "Failed Connections",
    MetricName
  )
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: PostgreSQL Active Connections & Failed Connections

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DOCUMENTDB"
| where MetricName == "TotalRequestUnits"
| summarize TotalRU = sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Cosmos DB Request Unit (RU) Consumption

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DOCUMENTDB"
| where MetricName == "TotalRequests"
| extend StatusCode = tostring(parse_json(DimensionList)[0]["value"])
| where StatusCode == "429"
| summarize ThrottledRequests = sum(Count) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Cosmos DB 429 Throttled Requests Over Time

content.json:
## Jira & External Dependencies
Container App health for Jira Service Management and MCP Atlassian, plus downstream dependency monitoring.

content.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where ContainerAppName_s in ("jira-sm", "mcp-atlassian")
| summarize
    LogCount = count(),
    ErrorCount = countif(Log_s contains "ERROR" or Log_s contains "Exception"),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by ContainerAppName_s
| extend
    Status = iff(ErrorCount == 0, "Healthy", iff(ErrorCount * 100.0 / LogCount < 5, "Warning", "Error")),
    ErrorRate = round(ErrorCount * 100.0 / LogCount, 2)
| project
    ContainerApp = ContainerAppName_s,
    Status,
    TotalLogs = LogCount,
    Errors = ErrorCount,
    ErrorRatePercent = ErrorRate,
    LastActivity = LastSeen
content.title: Container App Status: jira-sm & mcp-atlassian

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| summarize
    TotalCalls = count(),
    SuccessfulCalls = countif(Success == true),
    FailedCalls = countif(Success == false)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Target
| extend SuccessRate = round(SuccessfulCalls * 100.0 / TotalCalls, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, Target, SuccessRate
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Dependency Call Success Rate by Target (%)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| summarize
    P50_ms = round(percentile(DurationMs, 50), 1),
    P95_ms = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 1),
    P99_ms = round(percentile(DurationMs, 99), 1)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Target
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: External Dependency Latency by Target (ms)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {timeRange}
| where Success == false
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Source = AppRoleName,
    DependencyType = Type,
    Target,
    ResultCode,
    DurationMs = round(DurationMs, 1)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Failed Dependency Calls (Recent)
